home.lede: Thank you for celebrating our day with us. Upload the photos and videos you took here — they'll be kept in our gallery forever.
home.dropzone_sub: or tap to choose from your device · photos and videos

login.heading: Wedding photos
login.hint: Enter the password from your invitation to get in.

gallery.heading: Our gallery
gallery.lede: All the photos and videos you've captured, gathered in one place.
gallery.empty: There are no albums yet. As soon as someone uploads photos, they'll appear here.

gallery_all.heading: All photos
gallery_all.lede: Every memory you've shared from our big day. Tap a photo to view it larger or download it.
gallery_all.empty: There are no photos yet. Be the first to upload a memory!

person.empty: This person hasn't uploaded anything yet.

success.saved_text: Thank you so much for sharing your photos and videos with us. They're now part of our gallery.
success.none_text: We couldn't save your files. Make sure they are photos or videos and try again.

failed_note.one: 1 file couldn't be uploaded (invalid format or too large).
failed_note.other: {n} files couldn't be uploaded (invalid format or too large).

errors.too_many_attempts: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.invalid_name: That name isn't valid. Use at least one letter.
errors.bad_request: The request isn't valid. Check your details and try again.

js.error: An error occurred. Please try again.
